_doc: KARTA projektu myjka = JEDNO zrodlo prawdy. Tozsamosc WYLACZNIE z galerii Ali (EAFC czerwono-czarny). UWAGA: shop-imgs i wzorzec TikTok pokazuja INNY, neonowo-zielony egzemplarz (SEESE) = tylko POZY/beaty, NIGDY kolor/tozsamosc.

product.anatomy_str: a handheld cordless pressure washer gun, RED and matte-black body, pistol/drill grip; a black rechargeable battery pack clipped at the base with a small red accent; ONE straight silver stainless-steel lance extending from the front; a brass/gold quick-connect collar at the muzzle ending in ONE round red adjustable nozzle tip; a thin dark intake hose running from the gun base to a bucket
product.functional_count: 1 straight lance ending in 1 round nozzle tip at a SINGLE muzzle, 1 battery pack, 1 trigger — one nozzle, never a double barrel, never a second tip or lance
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE pressure washer gun in the scene, held in one hand; the other hand is empty or lightly steadies the hose
product._cv_note: hsv_color skalibrowany na CZERWONEJ obudowie/akumulatorze (median H~0-1, wraps 0/180 -> uzyty niewrapujacy zakres 0-12). cv_reliable=FALSE bo: (a) produkt w wiekszosci CZARNO-SREBRNY (grip/korpus/lanca/dysza/akumulator) z jedynie FRAGMENTARYCZNA czerwona obwodka rozdzielona czarnym korpusem -> maska HSV liczy rozproszone plamy, nie egzemplarze (1 blob != 1 produkt); (b) czerwien wraps 0/180 -> pojedynczy inRange zawodny. Licznik egzemplarzy = VLM wiersz-na-klatke. hsv_color zostaje jako pomocniczy/dokumentacyjny.

scenography.layout: outdoors on a driveway/lawn, one glossy BLACK sedan being washed, POV first-person over the right hand holding the gun; lance points from lower-right toward the car surface at upper-left; a bucket with water sits on the ground with the intake hose in it; same car, same location in every scene
scenography.swiatlo: soft diffuse overcast daylight from upper-left, even, no harsh blown highlights; wet gloss on black paint

action_steps: grip the gun, pull the trigger, a continuous high-pressure water jet leaves the nozzle front
aim the jet at a grimy surface (wheel / door panel / rocker); grime and mud stream off with the water
sweep the jet along the panel; a glossy clean stripe is revealed where the jet passed
release trigger; water sheets down the clean black paint with gravity; droplets drip from the nozzle
grammar.both_hands: right hand holds the gun and works the trigger through every scene; left hand is empty or lightly steadies the thin intake hose — NEVER holds a second gun/nozzle
grammar.physics: water exits the FRONT of the round nozzle tip as ONE continuous coherent jet ALONG THE LANCE AXIS (os pracy = os lancy = kierunek strumienia), hits the surface and sheets off downward under gravity; consistent water volume; the jet is liquid streams and spray mist, it must NOT turn into foam, blobs, clumps or floating balls; no water without a source; no pink/colored foam

screens_and_text: no readable text or logos anywhere (gun, battery, car plate); any tiny text blurred and illegible; no on-screen captions; no dials with readable numbers
